subcodes.first_line: O God, Who dost aid the sincere ones with hosts from the Most Glorious Kingdom, and grant success unto them that stand firm in Thy Covenant, through celestial legions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا موید المخلصین بجنود من الملکوت الابهی و موفق الثابتین علی عهدک بقبیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @prayer for protection, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
